scripts.build: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml python -m compileall packages/ml/src/ml
scripts.etl: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml python -m ml.data.etl --config ml/configs/data/default.yaml --output ml/data/processed
scripts.train: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml python -m ml.models.train --config ml/configs/train/default.yaml --dataset ml/data/processed/dataset.pt --weights ml/models/weights/model.pt
scripts.lint: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml ruff check packages/ml/src/ml packages/ml/tests
scripts.typecheck: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml mypy packages/ml/src/ml
scripts.test: cd ../.. && uv run --project packages/ml pytest packages/ml/tests -v
